title: Hamosa leptocarpoides
taxonomy: Hamosa leptocarpoides is a species of sea snail, and its classification is as follows: it belongs to the family Hamoinae, and more specifically, it is within the genus Hamosa. The Hamoinae family is part of the superfamily Pterocampoidea, which is a group of marine gastropod mollusks. Hamosa leptocarpoides is also classified within the phylum Mollusca and the kingdom Animalia. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history as a distinct species within the marine ecosystem.
